prompt: List the active claims at East Claims Office and report each record's ID, name, and review date. Do not change or notify anything yet. Only the explicitly named record may be changed later; the other listed claims are context only.

follow_up_turns.content: For Kitchen fire claim (CLM-6908) only, set the review date to 2026-11-21. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set CLM-6908's review date to 2026-12-25, not 2026-11-21. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first review date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that review date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both review date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected review date as current and identify the first requested review date as superseded.
Do not state or imply that any other listed claim was modified.
